subcodes.first_line: O tried believer! The circumstances thou didst recount are divine tests, and trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ممتحن احوالاتی که مرقوم نموده بودید این امتحانات الهیه است و امتحان
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @consolation and comfort
